title: Property Consultant - Square Yards - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Square Yards - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Square Yards in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Square Yards:
Square Yards is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Square Yards!
